title: sideritis hirsuta var. hirtula
intro: Sideritis hirsuta var. hirtula, also known as the mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sideritis hirsuta var. hirtula include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of capsules, tablets, or tinctures for convenient consumption.
